description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in autonomous mode, was gradually slowing to a stop for a red traffic signal on southbound Bryant 
Street at the intersection with 17th Street in San Francisco when it was rear-ended by a passenger car (Vehicle 2) traveling directly behind. 
The Zoox vehicle operator then disengaged from autonomy. Both vehicles proceeded a few feet further and pulled over to exchange 
information. Both the Zoox vehicle and Vehicle 2 sustained minor damage. The police were not called. The Zoox vehicle operator reported 
back pain after the collision.
Print
Clear Form
